front: Work: Harry Domin manages a company that produces the title artificial beings, who stage a revolt against humankind
Work: Alquist, the last surviving human, calls robots Primus and Helena the new Adam and Eve at the end of this play
Work: Helena Glory represents the Humanity League and advocates freeing the title beings in this play
Work: Helena burns Old Rossum's formula for making robots while her nurse Nana watches
Work: the super-intelligent robot Radius is sent to the library but concludes robots are superior and leads the rebellion
Work: Alquist is spared from the robot rebellion because of his hands; tells Damon and Radius he can't recreate the secret of life
Work: Captain van Toch discovers the title creatures near Sumatra / on Tana Masa / in Devil Bay
Work: the industrialist G.H. Bondy exploits the title creatures for pearl farming and forms the Salamander Syndicate
Work: Mr. Povondra's newspaper clippings form the central chapter 'Up the Ladder of Civilization' in this novel
Work: Mae West and George Bernard Shaw comment on whether the title creatures have souls in newspaper clippings
Work: ends with a metafictional conversation between the Author and the Writer imagining a war against the Lemurians
Work: a newt named Andrew Scheuchzer at the London Zoo learns English by reading newspapers
Work: an appendix satirizing academic writing details the sex life of the title creatures
Work: the 300-year-old opera singer Emilia Marty complicates the lawsuit Gregor v. Prus
work: The Makropulos Affair / The Makropulos Secret

front: Work: Bernard Williams wrote about 'the tedium of immortality' in reference to this play about a centuries-old opera singer
work: The Makropulos Affair / The Makropulos Secret

front: Work: the title character was granted immortality by Holy Roman Emperor Rudolf II via a parchment
work: The Makropulos Affair / The Makropulos Secret

front: Work: Doctor Galen has the only cure for a leprosy-like disease killing people over 45, but refuses to share it until world peace is declared
work: The White Disease / The White Plague

front: Work: the Marshal doesn't care about the title disease because the youthful military members are unaffected
work: The White Disease / The White Plague

front: Work: Galen works for Sigelius at the Lilienthal Clinic and is killed by a crowd shouting 'We want war!'
work: The White Disease / The White Plague

front: Work: a tramp dreams that human vices are represented as dung beetles, ants, and butterflies in this play co-written with Josef Capek
back: The Insect Play (Karel and Josef Capek)
work: The Insect Play (Pictures from the Insects' Life)

front: Work: E.M. Forster compared the British fascist vs. communist conflict to a scene from this play
back: The Insect Play (Karel and Josef Capek)
work: The Insect Play (Pictures from the Insects' Life)

front: Work: engineer Rudolph Marek invents the Karburator, which generates energy but produces 'the absolute' as a spiritual byproduct
Author: this Czech author's brother Josef coined the word 'robot' and designed the cover of R.U.R.'s first edition
Author: this author wrote Hordubal, in which Polana helps her lover murder her naive husband
Author: in one of this author's stories, a clerk is marginalized from society when his friends learn he owns a 7-headed hydra
Author: at a performance of R.U.R., this author asked Romain Rolland if he had patience for his 'stupid, boring' play
Author: this author wrote about a hack plagiarist in The Life and Work of the Composer Foltyn
